credentials.name: Telegram Bot API
credentials.note: Get your bot token from @BotFather on Telegram

credentials.name: Perplexity AI (Header Auth)
credentials.note: Get your API key from https://www.perplexity.ai/settings/api

credentials.name: VirusTotal (Header Auth)
credentials.note: Get your API key from https://www.virustotal.com/

credentials.name: AbuseIPDB (Header Auth)
credentials.note: Get your API key from https://www.abuseipdb.com/

credentials.name: Hybrid Analysis (Header Auth)
credentials.note: Get your API key from https://www.hybrid-analysis.com/

instructions: In n8n, go to Settings > Credentials and add each of these. The workflow references these credential names.
